sections.paragraph: f. (from the root תָּכַו) a measure, Eze 45:11 used of a daily rate, Exo 5:8 compare תֹּכֶו verse 18 Exo 30:32, בְּמַתְכֻּנְתֹּו “according to its measure,” i.e. proportion of parts, of which it is composed. 2Ch 24:13, “and they set the house of God עַל מַתְכֻּנְתֹּו according to its (pristine) measure.”
